title: Fire Aura PvP Texturepack
description: Get on fire and start playing with Fire Aura
body: This texturepack contains: - ﻿Modified diamond and netherite set (except hoe) - Modified trident, enderpearls, golden apples, bow, arrow, crossbow and elytras - Modified effect icons - Modified end crystals, respawn anchors, glowstone and obsidian - Modified nether portal - Modified health, experience and armor bar - Better sky (Only with optifine) - Fiery armor glint - Modified some particles - +Something I may have forgot Check Images: [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/fire-aura-the-best-pvp-texturepack/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/fire-aura-the-best-pvp-texturepack/)
